source_title: Google, Shopee-owner Sea to develop AI tools for e-commerce, gaming
claim: Google and Sea Ltd agreed to develop AI tools for e-commerce and gaming, including exploring the building of an AI agentic shopping prototype on Sea's e-commerce platform Shopee.
counterevidence: Full Reuters article could not be opened (HTTP 401); claim rests on the search-result snippet and should be reconfirmed against the primary article or a Google/Sea statement.
research_implication: Indicates SEA is pursuing agentic shopping with more than one large AI partner (Google and OpenAI), suggesting platform-dependence rather than a self-owned agent.
